summary: The test suite covers the primary functional and structural requirements, including static analysis (shellcheck, actionlint) and CI integration via 'act'. However, it fails on several specific instructions: it bundles all functional test cases into a single monolithic BATS test instead of running 'act' per case as requested, and it uses loose 'grep' assertions instead of the mandated exact value matching. This design makes the suite brittle and difficult to debug, as a failure in one logic case prevents the execution of subsequent assertions.
